finding: The '125 thin guides' from Phase 32 are the programmatic how-to-use guides (getAllHowToGuides()), NOT the 107 blog posts.

blog_posts.detail: Original articles, 5-14 min reading times, specific topics, calculator integrations, unique content per post.

how_to_guides.detail: Programmatic template: 'How to Use X Calculator' with generic steps (Enter Numbers, Adjust, Review, Visualize). Near-duplicate structure. Zero impressions/0 clicks per Phase 32.

KEEP_IN_SITEMAP: All 107 blog posts — quality content with unique topics
REMOVE_FROM_SITEMAP: All 124 how-to guides — thin, programmatic, zero-value
/guides index page — massive listing of thin guides
classification.notes: Blog posts remain live, indexed, and in sitemap. How-to guides remain accessible but excluded from sitemap.
